title: Looks like Anthropic’s mission is to wipe out all white-collar jobs. Claude can now use a computer. It can open your apps, navigate your browser, fill in spreadsheets, and do almost anything you would do sitting at your desk.

content.summary: Looks like Anthropic’s mission is to wipe out all white-collar jobs. Claude can now use a computer. It can open your apps, navigate your browser, fill in spreadsheets, and do almost anything you would do sitting at your desk. Video
